question_text: Two devices are compared: Device X transfers 6,000 J in 10 seconds, and Device Y transfers 8,000 J in 20 seconds. Which device has greater power?

options.label: D
options.text: Cannot determine without knowing the type of device

explanation: Device X: P = 6,000 J ÷ 10 s = 600 W. Device Y: P = 8,000 J ÷ 20 s = 400 W. Device X is more powerful because it transfers more energy per second, even though it transfers less total energy.
